APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LONG, JANEEN

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JANEEN LONG'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTER FEES. JANEEN LONG HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. J. ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF JANEEN LONG ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
